sections.paragraph:
Original: בּרושׁ

Transliteration: berôsh

Phonetic: ber-osh'

BDB Definition:

  1. cypress, fir, juniper, pine
    1. a noble tree (literally)
    2. of stateliness (figuratively)
    3. material for temple

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: 289a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
